column1: PROJECTE NEO4J - PADRONS_Exercici_1,,"// PROJECTE NEO4J - PADRONS
// Cada individu queda identificat pel seu Id.
CREATE CONSTRAINT individu_id IF NOT EXISTS
// Cada habitatge queda identificat per municipi + any + id de llar.
// Com que Id_Llar es pot repetir en anys o municipis diferents, creem una clau artificial anomenada id_habitatge.
CREATE CONSTRAINT habitatge_id IF NOT EXISTS
// Indexos útils per accelerar consultes posteriors.
CREATE INDEX individu_nom IF NOT EXISTS
CREATE INDEX individu_cognoms IF NOT EXISTS
CREATE INDEX individu_any IF NOT EXISTS
CREATE INDEX habitatge_municipi_any IF NOT EXISTS
CREATE INDEX habitatge_carrer IF NOT EXISTS
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///INDIVIDUAL.csv' AS row
WHEN row.name IS NULL OR trim(row.name) = '' OR toLower(trim(row.name)) IN ['null', 'nan']
WHEN row.surname IS NULL OR trim(row.surname) = '' OR toLower(trim(row.surname)) IN ['null', 'nan']
WHEN row.second_surname IS NULL OR trim(row.second_surname) = '' OR toLower(trim(row.second_surname)) IN ['null', 'nan']
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///HABITATGES.csv' AS row
WHEN row.Carrer IS NULL OR trim(row.Carrer) = '' OR toLower(trim(row.Carrer)) IN ['null', 'nan']
WHEN row.Numero IS NULL OR trim(row.Numero) = '' OR toLower(trim(row.Numero)) IN ['null', 'nan']
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///VIU.csv' AS row
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///FAMILIA.csv' AS row
WHEN row.Relacio IS NULL OR trim(row.Relacio) = '' OR toLower(trim(row.Relacio)) IN ['null', 'nan']
WHEN row.Relacio_Harmonitzada IS NULL OR trim(row.Relacio_Harmonitzada) = '' OR toLower(trim(row.Relacio_Harmonitzada)) IN ['null', 'nan']
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///SAME_AS.csv' AS row
